response:
```json
{
  "action": "sql",
  "sql": "SELECT
  p.dept_cd,
  s.cntry_cd,
  SUM(ol.line_amt) AS total_revenue
FROM ord_ln ol
JOIN ord_hdr oh ON ol.ord_id = oh.ord_id
JOIN prod_ref p ON ol.prod_id = p.prod_id
JOIN store_dim s ON oh.store_id = s.store_id
WHERE ol.line_sts_cd <> 'X'
GROUP BY p.dept_cd, s.cntry_cd
ORDER BY p.dept_cd, s.cntry_cd",
  "reason": null
}
```
